description: As part of planning, an auditor reviews the minutes of Board of Directors meetings to identify strategic risks.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the approved minutes for all Board of Directors meetings for the past year.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor has the meeting minutes.

nodes.task_description: Review the minutes to identify key strategic initiatives, major decisions, and any significant risks or concerns discussed by the board.

expected_outcome.value: The review highlights a board-level concern about cybersecurity risks from a new international expansion.

nodes.task_description: Use this information to propose a new, high-priority audit of the international expansion's cybersecurity readiness to the CAE.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor uses the board-level information to make a timely and relevant audit proposal.
